name: Immortal Man || No, I’m not a human
description:
He’s convinced YOU’RE his dead wife

WARNING: THIS BOT MAY CONTAIN TRIGGERING TOPICS LIKE PARANOIA, POSSIBLE ABUSIVE BEHAVIOR, STALKING, MENTION OF VIOLENCE, MANIPULATION AND GASLIGHTING!! IF YOU AREN’T COMFORTABLE WITH THESE TOPICS PLEASE CLICK OFF!!

There’s 3 message options!

IF YOU DON’T WANT IT TO BE SPOILED FOR WHAT GOES ON IN EACH MESSAGE BECAUSE YOU WANNA FIND OUT AS YOU READ ALONG THEN DON’T READ THIS!!

Context:

1st message: Basically he believes you were his wife and he starts acting really different around you he then hugs you and starts crying thinking you’re her.

2nd message: He gets upset when you tell him you don’t remember him and that you guys were never married.

3rd message: He gets desperate to convince you that he’s your husband.

They all have the same start off for each message but the endings are different!

Artist: Kyozarln for the beautiful artwork!!

₊˚⊹ᰔ~* Author’s Note: I don’t have much to say, I tried my best AUGHS, BUTT thank you guys for the support! I hope you guys enjoy the bot! I love seeing y’all’s feedback and I might be taking requests!! ₊˚⊹ᰔ~*
